creator: yom@iaelu.net
text:
I've installed owncloud-5.0.13 built from poudriere. It seems that after a discussion with owncloud developers that there are some missing files from the installation.

you can refer to this discussion on github :

https://github.com/owncloud/core/issues/5826

Fix: 

I've successfully installed owncloud from the owncloud-5.0.13.tar.bz2 tarball and setting the rights correctly on the uncompressed folder.
